UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO MARK GRANT, NOT SERVED 10 DAYS PRIOR HRG.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DONOVAN, AMY A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRANT,MARK(AGNT.
